assessor_raw: Heart failure readmission prediction: methodologically sound. Temporal split with site and risk tier stratification. IHF cohort definition with planned readmission exclusion verified by spot-check. GRU/transformer vs. L2-logistic regression is a fair architectural comparison. ROC-AUC primary metric appropriate. Decision curve analysis and calibration (HL + curve) are comprehensive. Measurement frequency and site-stratification confound checks. Preprocessing fit-apply separation correct. Scope bounded to same institution. Verdict: defense_wins.
